subcodes.first_line: Know thou that the heedless ones have expelled Us from the City of God with manifest tyranny, whereupon the wailing of lamentation was raised [3.5s]... ...Praise be unto Thee, O Lord my God, for having chosen us to sustain Thy trials and bear hardships for love of Thee and in acquiescence unto Thy good-pleasure
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم بان الغافلین خرجونا عن مدینه الله بظلم مبین و بذلک ارتفع عویل البکاء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @angels, @suffering and imprisonment, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation
